name: data-redis
description: Redis is an optional rate-limit backend only (INV-6): when REDIS_URL is set, apps/api/lib/rate-limit uses it instead of the in-memory limiter. It is NOT a session store (sessions are stateless JWT, INV-3/INV-7). This module declaratively documents the REDIS_URL knob; it ships no apps/api/src/** payload.

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL; when set, switches apps/api/lib/rate-limit from the in-memory limiter to a Redis-backed one
